name: Credit Repair Commanders
description_short: Las Vegas-based credit repair firm offering dispute services, collection removal, and debt relief programs with unlimited disputes and free in-person consultations.
description_long:
Community Credit Repair operates as a credit repair and debt relief service provider headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada. The company markets itself as "the credit repair leaders in Las Vegas, NV" and has been in the credit restoration space, offering both credit repair and debt management solutions to consumers facing credit challenges, collections, and judgment issues.

The company offers a broad suite of services including credit dispute filing, collection account removal, charge-off removal, tax lien removal, judgment removal, bankruptcy removal, and late payment removal from credit reports. They also provide debt consolidation services, a credit card relief program with shortened 24-36 month terms and payments starting at $200/month, and a credit card payment program designed to lower interest rates and cut payments in half while maintaining good standing. Additionally, they offer identity restoration, student loan guidance, and consultation on eviction removal and medical debt.

Community Credit Repair distinguishes itself through several specific offerings: unlimited disputes and validation letters (rather than per-dispute fees), a fee structure based on savings achieved rather than a percentage of debt balances, and free in-person consultations including soft pulls of all three credit reports. They also offer walk-in service Monday-Friday 8am-6pm at their physical Las Vegas location and explicitly call out that their service fees are based on actual savings, positioning this against "the industry average fee" of 25% of total debt.

The company's website is extensive with educational content on credit topics, but lacks transparent pricing, specific success rates, or detailed program terms. Their debt relief offerings (particularly the card relief program) position them in multiple categories simultaneously. No licensing, certifications, or regulatory compliance information is prominently displayed. The breadth of claims (bankruptcy removal, eviction removal, etc.) is typical of credit repair marketing but should be understood within the legal limits of what credit repair can actually accomplish.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free in-person consultations with soft pull of all three credit reports included
Unlimited disputes and validation letters rather than per-dispute fees
Fee structure based on savings achieved, not percentage of debt balances
Physical walk-in location in Las Vegas with extended weekday hours (8am-6pm)
Multiple contact methods: phone (702-724-0500), text (702-591-4933), and online form
Debt relief programs with shorter 24-36 month terms and lower starting payments ($200/month)
Extensive educational content and blog covering credit laws and repair processes
cons: No transparent pricing or fee schedule published on website; fees described only generally
No verifiable success rates, client testimonials, or case studies provided
No displayed licensing, certifications, or regulatory compliance credentials
Broad claims (bankruptcy removal, eviction removal) lack specific legal disclaimers about what is actually achievable
Website conflates credit repair and debt relief services without clear program separation or different fee structures
best_for: Las Vegas area residents with collection accounts, charge-offs, or negative items they want disputed
Consumers with credit card debt seeking payment reduction and interest rate negotiation
Those facing judgments, tax liens, or repossession who want professional dispute assistance
People who prefer in-person consultation and want their credit reports reviewed before committing
diagnosis: Community Credit Repair is best suited for Las Vegas-area consumers with collections, charge-offs, judgments, or late payments who want unlimited dispute filing and prefer face-to-face consultation. The main caveat is that pricing is not transparent, success rates are unverified, and claims about removing bankruptcies and evictions should be understood within realistic legal limits—not all negative items can be legally removed regardless of tactics used.
services: Credit report disputes and unlimited dispute filing
Credit card relief program (24-36 months, $200+ monthly payments)
Credit card payment program (interest rate reduction, payment reduction)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7265 Dean Martin Dr #120, Las Vegas, NV 89118
